name: 4NX Blue Raspberry Ice
content: Experience the premium quality of 4NX Blue Raspberry Ice nicotine pouches by 4NX with Ice flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium 4NX Blue Raspberry Ice nicotine pouches by 4NX with Ice flavor

descriptions.long:
Nostalgic blue raspberry that doesn't pretend to be natural. Fun, sweet, and tasty.

At 10mg per pouch, this falls into the strong category. Substantial nicotine kick that regular users will appreciate. Noticeable throat sensation and quicker satisfaction.

**About 4NX**
4NX (pronounced "for nix" or "for kicks") is a UK brand focusing on accessible nicotine pouches for the British market.Founded in 2021 by UK entrepreneurs in UK.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Immediate sweetness with berry tang. The icy variants add cooling after initial taste.

**Who Is This For?**
For experienced users. Experienced users typically use 4-8 pouches daily. Space out usage for best results.

**Note:** Not recommended for beginners. Build up tolerance with lower strengths first.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of 4NX Blue Raspberry Ice nicotine pouches by 4NX with Ice flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: 4NX
brand.heritage: 4NX (pronounced "for nix" or "for kicks") is a UK brand focusing on accessible nicotine pouches for the British market.
brand.story: 4NX brings locally-relevant products to UK consumers with flavours and strengths suited to British preferences.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

name: 4NX Arctic Mint
content: Experience the premium quality of 4NX Arctic Mint nicotine pouches by 4NX with Mint flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium 4NX Arctic Mint nicotine pouches by 4NX with Mint flavor

descriptions.long:
Arctic-level cooling that hits hard and fast. For users who find regular mint too mild.

At 12mg per pouch, this falls into the extra strong category. Intense nicotine delivery with strong throat hit. Significant effects within minutes.

**About 4NX**
4NX (pronounced "for nix" or "for kicks") is a UK brand focusing on accessible nicotine pouches for the British market.Founded in 2021 by UK entrepreneurs in UK.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Intense cooling from first contact. The sensation spreads across the mouth within seconds.

**Who Is This For?**
Experienced users only. Limit usage and space pouches further apart. Effects can be too intense for some.

**Note:** Can cause nausea, dizziness, or discomfort if tolerance is insufficient. Start with half a pouch if unsure.

name: 4NX Mint
content: Experience the premium quality of 4NX Mint nicotine pouches by 4NX with Mint flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium 4NX Mint nicotine pouches by 4NX with Mint flavor

descriptions.long:
A balanced mint flavour that's neither too sweet nor too sharp. The cooling sensation comes through smoothly, making it a reliable everyday choice.

At 18mg per pouch, this falls into the ultra category. Maximum nicotine intensity. Very strong effects that last. Not for casual users.

**About 4NX**
4NX (pronounced "for nix" or "for kicks") is a UK brand focusing on accessible nicotine pouches for the British market.Founded in 2021 by UK entrepreneurs in UK.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Cooling builds gradually over 2-3 minutes, peaking around 10 minutes before settling into a mild freshness.

**Who Is This For?**
Heavy users with high tolerance. Use sparingly - effects are powerful. Many users limit to 2-4 per day maximum.

**Note:** Serious strength that requires substantial tolerance. Overconsumption can cause significant discomfort. Know your limits.

name: 77 Apple & Mint
content: Experience the premium quality of 77 Apple & Mint nicotine pouches by 77 with Mint flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium 77 Apple & Mint nicotine pouches by 77 with Mint flavor

descriptions.long:
Crisp green apple with appropriate tartness. Like biting into a Granny Smith.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About 77**
77 is Swedish Match's value-oriented nicotine pouch brand, offering quality at accessible prices. The brand leverages Swedish Match's manufacturing expertise while targeting budget-conscious consumers.Founded in 2020 by Swedish Match in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Crisp tartness initially, sweetness develops. Very clean finish.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of 77 Apple & Mint nicotine pouches by 77 with Mint flavor. tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.

for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.

Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Ace
brand.heritage: Ace comes from Denmark's Ministry of Snus, a company focused on innovative nicotine products. The brand offers a balanced range of strengths and flavours with Scandinavian quality.
brand.story: Ace brings Danish design sensibility to nicotine pouches. Clean flavours, thoughtful packaging, and reliable performance define the brand.
facts: Part of Ministry of Snus portfolio

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

name: Ace Double Mint
content: Experience the premium quality of Ace Double Mint nicotine pouches with Mint flavor. excerpt: Premium Ace Double Mint nicotine pouches with Mint flavor

descriptions.long:
Traditional spearmint with a clean finish. No artificial aftertaste, just straightforward mint the way it should be.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About Ace**
Ace comes from Denmark's Ministry of Snus, a company focused on innovative nicotine products. The brand offers a balanced range of strengths and flavours with Scandinavian quality.Founded in 2019 by Ministry of Snus in Denmark.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Cooling builds gradually over 2-3 minutes, peaking around 10 minutes before settling into a mild freshness.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.

brand.name: Ace
brand.heritage: Ace comes from Denmark's Ministry of Snus, a company focused on innovative nicotine products. The brand offers a balanced range of strengths and flavours with Scandinavian quality.
brand.story: Ace brings Danish design sensibility to nicotine pouches. Clean flavours, thoughtful packaging, and reliable performance define the brand.
facts: Part of Ministry of Snus portfolio

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.name: Apres
brand.heritage: Apres (French for "after") positions itself for moments of relaxation and unwinding.
brand.story: Apres creates products for downtime - after work, after dinner, after the gym.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.name: Chainpop
brand.heritage: Chainpop offers a wide variety of creative flavour combinations at accessible prices.
brand.story: Chainpop experiments with flavours that other brands might consider too unusual, appealing to adventurous users.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

**About Cuba**

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

name: ELF Cool Storm
content: Experience the premium quality of ELF Cool Storm nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium ELF Cool Storm nicotine pouches

descriptions.long:
A balanced flavour profile designed for everyday enjoyment.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About ELF**
ELF expanded from disposable vapes into nicotine pouches, bringing their flavour expertise to the oral nicotine category.Founded in 2021 by ELF Bar team in Europe.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Consistent flavour throughout use.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.

Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.

descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of ELUX Raspberry nicotine pouches with Berry flavor. brand.name: ELUX
brand.heritage: ELUX moved from vaping products into nicotine pouches, targeting UK consumers with accessible products.
brand.story: ELUX brings vape-inspired flavours to the pouch format, appealing to users who enjoy bold, creative tastes.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Fix Watermelon Ice nicotine pouches with Ice flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Fix
brand.heritage: Fix positioned itself as a reliable, no-nonsense nicotine pouch brand with straightforward products and honest marketing.
brand.story: Fix does what it says - delivers nicotine in a convenient format without fancy claims or extreme marketing.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Helwit Cherry nicotine pouches with Cherry flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. brand.name: Helwit
brand.heritage: Helwit was developed as a clean, straightforward nicotine pouch brand with a focus on quality ingredients and transparent manufacturing. Swedish-made with Scandinavian design principles.
brand.story: Helwit keeps things simple: quality pouches, honest flavours, no gimmicks. The brand appeals to users who want reliable performance without flashy marketing.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

content: Experience the premium quality of Helwit Salmiak nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium Helwit Salmiak nicotine pouches

descriptions.long:
A balanced flavour profile designed for everyday enjoyment.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About Helwit**
Helwit was developed as a clean, straightforward nicotine pouch brand with a focus on quality ingredients and transparent manufacturing. Swedish-made with Scandinavian design principles.Founded in 2020 by Habit Factory AB in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Consistent flavour throughout use.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Helwit Salmiak nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Helwit
brand.heritage: Helwit was developed as a clean, straightforward nicotine pouch brand with a focus on quality ingredients and transparent manufacturing. Swedish-made with Scandinavian design principles.
brand.story: Helwit keeps things simple: quality pouches, honest flavours, no gimmicks. The brand appeals to users who want reliable performance without flashy marketing.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.name: Ice

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About Iceberg**
Iceberg positioned itself in the premium strong pouch segment, offering a wide variety of flavours with substantial nicotine content. The brand name reflects its cooling, intense experience.Founded in 2020 by Undisclosed in Europe.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Crisp tartness initially, sweetness develops. Very clean finish.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Iceberg Apple Lemon Pineapple nicotine pouches with Ice flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Iceberg
brand.heritage: Iceberg positioned itself in the premium strong pouch segment, offering a wide variety of flavours with substantial nicotine content. The brand name reflects its cooling, intense experience.
brand.story: Iceberg fills the gap between mainstream brands and extreme-strength products. With 20-50mg options and adventurous flavours, it appeals to experienced users wanting variety without going to extremes.
facts: Strong to very strong nicotine levels

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Iceberg Kiwi Strawberry nicotine pouches with Ice flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Iceberg
brand.heritage: Iceberg positioned itself in the premium strong pouch segment, offering a wide variety of flavours with substantial nicotine content. The brand name reflects its cooling, intense experience.
brand.story: Iceberg fills the gap between mainstream brands and extreme-strength products. With 20-50mg options and adventurous flavours, it appeals to experienced users wanting variety without going to extremes.
facts: Strong to very strong nicotine levels

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

facts: Strong to very strong nicotine levels

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.

If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

Cooling builds gradually over 2-3 minutes, peaking around 10 minutes before settling into a mild freshness.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of KILLA Green Mint nicotine pouches by KILLA with Mint flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: KILLA
brand.heritage: KILLA emerged from Poland's growing nicotine pouch industry, quickly gaining a reputation for bold flavours and strong nicotine content. The brand targets younger users with edgy branding and fruit-forward flavours.
brand.story: KILLA doesn't pretend to be subtle. With names like "Cold Mint" and "Watermelon" and strength levels that compete with Siberia, the brand appeals to users who want an intense experience.
facts: Known for bold flavours and high strength

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.heritage: KILLA emerged from Poland's growing nicotine pouch industry, quickly gaining a reputation for bold flavours and strong nicotine content. The brand targets younger users with edgy branding and fruit-forward flavours.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

name: Klint Mint
content: Experience the premium quality of Klint Mint nicotine pouches with Mint flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium Klint Mint nicotine pouches with Mint flavor

descriptions.long:
A balanced mint flavour that's neither too sweet nor too sharp. The cooling sensation comes through smoothly, making it a reliable everyday choice.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About Klint**
Klint offers a more accessible entry point to nicotine pouches with moderate strengths and approachable flavours. Swedish-made with attention to comfort and taste.Founded in 2019 by The Snus Brothers in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Cooling builds gradually over 2-3 minutes, peaking around 10 minutes before settling into a mild freshness.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.

brand.heritage: Kurwa takes its name from a Polish expletive, signaling its irreverent approach. The brand is known for extremely high nicotine content and bold marketing.
brand.story: Kurwa embraces controversy with its name and extreme products. Strictly for experienced users who want maximum nicotine delivery.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.heritage: Kurwa takes its name from a Polish expletive, signaling its irreverent approach. The brand is known for extremely high nicotine content and bold marketing.
brand.story: Kurwa embraces controversy with its name and extreme products. Strictly for experienced users who want maximum nicotine delivery.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.name: Kurwa

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.name: Kurwa
brand.heritage: Kurwa takes its name from a Polish expletive, signaling its irreverent approach. The brand is known for extremely high nicotine content and bold marketing.
brand.story: Kurwa embraces controversy with its name and extreme products. Strictly for experienced users who want maximum nicotine delivery.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

content: Experience the premium quality of Level Watermelon nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium Level Watermelon nicotine pouches

descriptions.long:
Refreshing watermelon with that distinctive light sweetness. Summery and light.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About Level**
Level offers a range of precisely measured nicotine strengths for consistent dosing.Founded in 2021 by European producers in Europe.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Light, refreshing sweetness. Often paired with cooling for extra freshness.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Level Watermelon nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Level
brand.heritage: Level offers a range of precisely measured nicotine strengths for consistent dosing.
brand.story: Level is for users who want to know exactly how much nicotine they're getting.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

Loop was created by Another Snus Factory, known for innovative product development. The brand uses a unique "Instant Rush" technology for faster nicotine release and focuses on sustainability.Founded in 2019 by Another Snus Factory team in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Smallest format. Nearly invisible under the lip. Perfect for situations requiring absolute discretion. Slightly shorter duration (15-25 minutes) due to smaller size.

**What to Expect**
Consistent flavour throughout use.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Loop Jalapeno Lime nicotine pouches with Lime flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Loop
brand.heritage: Loop was created by Another Snus Factory, known for innovative product development. The brand uses a unique "Instant Rush" technology for faster nicotine release and focuses on sustainability.
brand.story: Loop aims to reinvent the nicotine pouch with technology-driven improvements. Their patented delivery system provides quicker satisfaction, while eco-conscious packaging appeals to environmentally aware consumers.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

**Format & Usage**
Full-size format. Larger pouch with maximum capacity. Noticeable presence under the lip. Extended duration of 30-45+ minutes. Maximum flavour and nicotine.

**What to Expect**
Consistent flavour throughout use.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Lundgrens Vagsvall nicotine pouches by Lundgrens. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Lundgrens
brand.heritage: Lundgrens has deep roots in Swedish snus tradition, producing quality products for over two decades before entering the tobacco-free pouch market.
brand.story: With authentic Swedish heritage, Lundgrens brings traditional craftsmanship to modern nicotine pouches. Quality and consistency are paramount.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

Nordic Spirit is JTI's entry into the tobacco-free pouch market, leveraging the company's Scandinavian operations and global distribution network.Founded in 2019 by Japan Tobacco International in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Standard format. Traditional pouch size. More noticeable but delivers fuller flavour. Longer duration of 25-40 minutes. More nicotine capacity.

**What to Expect**
Consistent flavour throughout use.

**Who Is This For?**
For experienced users. Experienced users typically use 4-8 pouches daily. Space out usage for best results.

**Note:** Not recommended for beginners. Build up tolerance with lower strengths first.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Nordic Spirit 9mg Variety Bundle - 3 Pack nicotine pouches by Nordic Spirit. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Nordic
brand.heritage: Nordic Spirit is JTI's entry into the tobacco-free pouch market, leveraging the company's Scandinavian operations and global distribution network.
brand.story: Backed by one of the world's largest tobacco companies, Nordic Spirit brings manufacturing scale and consistent quality to the nicotine pouch category.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.

for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

name: Pablo Bubblegum
content: Experience the premium quality of Pablo Bubblegum nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium Pablo Bubblegum nicotine pouches

descriptions.long:
Nostalgic bubblegum flavour done right. Fun and sweet.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About Pablo**
Pablo quickly became infamous for producing some of the strongest nicotine pouches available, with products reaching up to 50mg per pouch. The brand doesn't shy away from its reputation for extreme strength.Founded in 2019 by N.G.P. Empire in Poland.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Immediate sweetness that's very familiar. Long-lasting flavour.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.

descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Pablo Mango Ice nicotine pouches with Ice flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Pablo
brand.heritage: Pablo quickly became infamous for producing some of the strongest nicotine pouches available, with products reaching up to 50mg per pouch. The brand doesn't shy away from its reputation for extreme strength.
brand.story: Named provocatively, Pablo carved out a niche as the go-to brand for users seeking extreme nicotine delivery. The brand is upfront about its strength - these products are strictly for experienced users.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

content: Experience the premium quality of Poke Citrus nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium Poke Citrus nicotine pouches

descriptions.long:
Tangy citrus blend with genuine zing. Refreshing and energizing.

At 9mg per pouch, this falls into the strong category. Substantial nicotine kick that regular users will appreciate. Noticeable throat sensation and quicker satisfaction.

**About Poke**
Poke offers playful products with light-hearted branding.Founded in 2021 by European producers in Europe.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Immediate tang that stimulates saliva. Clean, fresh finish.

**Who Is This For?**
For experienced users. Experienced users typically use 4-8 pouches daily. Space out usage for best results.

**Note:** Not recommended for beginners. Build up tolerance with lower strengths first.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Poke Citrus nicotine pouches. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.

brand.name: Poke
brand.heritage: Poke offers playful products with light-hearted branding.
brand.story: Poke doesn't take itself too seriously - fun flavours, casual vibes.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.

**About Siberia**
Siberia became legendary in the snus world for its extreme nicotine strength, originally launched as a traditional snus before tobacco-free versions appeared. The name evokes the harsh Siberian cold, matching its intense menthol kick.Founded in 2004 by GN Tobacco Sweden in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**

**Who Is This For?**
Heavy users with high tolerance. Use sparingly - effects are powerful. Many users limit to 2-4 per day maximum.

**Note:** Serious strength that requires substantial tolerance. Overconsumption can cause significant discomfort. Know your limits.

brand.heritage: Skruf started in Skruv, a small village in southern Sweden, founded by two entrepreneurs who wanted to challenge the Swedish Match monopoly. The brand name plays on both the village name and Swedish slang. Imperial Brands acquired Skruf in 2019.
brand.story: What began as two friends' rebellion against tobacco giants became one of Sweden's most respected snus and nicotine pouch makers. Skruf maintains its craft approach while benefiting from Imperial's global distribution.
facts: Named after the village of Skruv
Known for quality tobacco and now pouches

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.name: Thunder

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

**Format & Usage**
Smallest format. Nearly invisible under the lip. Perfect for situations requiring absolute discretion. Slightly shorter duration (15-25 minutes) due to smaller size.

**What to Expect**
Gentle cooling with sweetness that develops over time. Pleasant throughout the full duration.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
descriptions.original: Experience the premium quality of Velo Bright Spearmint nicotine pouches by Velo with Mint flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. brand.name: Velo
brand.heritage: VELO emerged from BAT's modern oral nicotine portfolio, rebranding from the earlier Lyft/Epok products. BAT, founded in 1902, invested heavily in smoke-free alternatives. VELO represents their flagship tobacco-free pouch brand, developed in their Swedish innovation hub.
brand.story: VELO combines British American Tobacco's global reach with Swedish pouch expertise. The brand focuses on accessibility and a wide flavour range, making nicotine pouches approachable for those transitioning from smoking.
facts: Formerly known as Lyft in some markets
Part of BAT's £5 billion smoke-free investment

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

brand.name: Velo

facts: Formerly known as Lyft in some markets
Part of BAT's £5 billion smoke-free investment

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

excerpt: Premium Velo Zesty Elderflower nicotine pouches by Velo

descriptions.long:
Well-crafted taste that delivers consistent satisfaction.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About Velo**
VELO emerged from BAT's modern oral nicotine portfolio, rebranding from the earlier Lyft/Epok products. BAT, founded in 1902, invested heavily in smoke-free alternatives. VELO represents their flagship tobacco-free pouch brand, developed in their Swedish innovation hub.Founded in 2019 by British American Tobacco in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Low-profile format. Sits flat against the gum. Comfortable for extended wear without noticeable bulge. Standard duration of 20-35 minutes depending on product.

**What to Expect**
Consistent flavour throughout use.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.

brand.name: Velo
brand.heritage: VELO emerged from BAT's modern oral nicotine portfolio, rebranding from the earlier Lyft/Epok products. BAT, founded in 1902, invested heavily in smoke-free alternatives. VELO represents their flagship tobacco-free pouch brand, developed in their Swedish innovation hub.
brand.story: VELO combines British American Tobacco's global reach with Swedish pouch expertise. The brand focuses on accessibility and a wide flavour range, making nicotine pouches approachable for those transitioning from smoking.
facts: Formerly known as Lyft in some markets
Part of BAT's £5 billion smoke-free investment

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

tips: Place the pouch between your upper lip and gum. The nicotine absorbs through the gum tissue.
A slight tingling sensation is normal - this is the nicotine being released.
Keep the pouch in place for 20-45 minutes depending on strength and format.
Dispose of used pouches responsibly - most cans have a compartment for used pouches.
Stay hydrated. Nicotine pouches can cause dry mouth.
Store pouches in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration extends freshness but isn't required.
for_beginners: Start with a lower strength (4-6mg) if you're new to nicotine pouches.
Use for 10-15 minutes initially to gauge your tolerance.
If you feel dizzy or nauseous, remove the pouch immediately.
Don't swallow - while not dangerous, it's uncomfortable.
Wait at least an hour before trying a second pouch if new to these products.
for_switchers: Former smokers often start with regular strength (6-8mg) and adjust from there.
Vape users may need less nicotine than expected - start lower and increase if needed.
The absorption is different from smoking - effects may feel different even at equivalent nicotine levels.
Give yourself a week to adjust to the different delivery method.

name: ViD Mint
content: Experience the premium quality of ViD Mint nicotine pouches with Mint flavor. These high-quality nicotine pouches provide a satisfying and discreet nicotine experience without tobacco. Perfect for on-the-go use, these pouches offer a clean and modern alternative to traditional smoking.
excerpt: Premium ViD Mint nicotine pouches with Mint flavor

descriptions.long:
Traditional spearmint with a clean finish. No artificial aftertaste, just straightforward mint the way it should be.

This falls into the regular category. Moderate nicotine that satisfies without overwhelming. The sweet spot for most regular users.

**About ViD**
ViD offers a range of nicotine strengths with consistent Swedish quality.Founded in 2020 by Swedish producers in Sweden.

**Format & Usage**
Smallest format. Nearly invisible under the lip. Perfect for situations requiring absolute discretion. Slightly shorter duration (15-25 minutes) due to smaller size.

**What to Expect**
Cooling builds gradually over 2-3 minutes, peaking around 10 minutes before settling into a mild freshness.

**Who Is This For?**
Ideal for everyday users. Suitable for regular use throughout the day. Most users find 5-10 pouches per day comfortable.

**Note:** Monitor usage if new to pouches - effects are more noticeable than light strength.
